Title: Nazo no yunzabitto! Kami-Sama no uchûsen o sagase
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Son Goku, Son Gohan, and Kuririn recover in the hospital. Also, after accidentally destroying the Saiyajin spaceship, Bulma goes with Mr. Popo to find another ship that Kami-Sama told him about.
